creator: yukiteruamano@openmailbox.org
text: When trying to open a document from pcmanfm, Libreoffice refuses to open properly staying hang up on the splash. Libreoffice run fine from the console or the application menu and then I can open the document without issues. I am using Awesome WM and LibreOffice 5.0.4.2 00m0(Build:2).
